## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and address SEO-related issues found in Prophecy.io's Webflow-based blog.](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple SEO issues identified: duplicate H1 tags, lorem ipsum text, unexpected H3 tags, and unusual internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Yigit (thefunf.com) will implement fixes, likely using JavaScript for H1 issue and investigating template problems for others](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Google crawler reads markup, not executed JavaScript, influencing SEO solution approach](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Some issues (e.g., internal linking) may be less problematic than initially thought due to site structure](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

## Topics

### Duplicate H1 Tags

  - [Issue: Multiple H1 tags appearing in HTML, invisible on frontend](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Cause: Conditional visibility for different layouts, Webflow keeps hidden elements in markup](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Solution: Yigit to implement JavaScript fix to remove duplicates on page load](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Concern: Effectiveness depends on whether Google's crawler executes JavaScript (it doesn't)](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Lorem Ipsum Text

  - [Problem: Placeholder text found in blog pages, potentially flagged as low quality by Google](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Action: Yigit to investigate and remove across the site, not just blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### Unexpected H3 Tags

  - [Issue: Four specific H3 tags appearing before H1 in blog post HTML](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Yigit to investigate cause in blog post template](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Unusual Internal Linking

  - [Problem: Search Console showing unexpected referring pages with odd parameters](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Likely cause: Recent posts section at the end of each blog post + parameter carrying between pages](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Less concerning than initially thought due to site structure explanation](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Yigit to implement JavaScript solution for duplicate H1 tags](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Investigate and fix lorem ipsum text across the site](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Examine blog post template for unexpected H3 tag issue](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Review overall template for any other potential SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Yigit to keep team updated on fixes and implementations](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Team to reassess SEO impact once changes are made](https://fathom.video/share/m7Ws4CjTUgPyTYxPnTNwATfNmCi1gNJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
